claim: User preference: User's requirement: DinoBrain must become a closed-loop OS where every Codex/Claude session gets pre-response OS context, uses reviewed LLM Wiki memory/provenance, writes finish traces, grows knowledge, and policy-pushes to GitHub; current user instruction always outranks memory.
